Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The nameplate says, "Takeba."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari doesn't seem to be in her room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari doesn't seem to be in her room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sorry, but I didn't study at all over the weekend, so I'm getting it done now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe some other time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari seems to be studying.[n]I shouldn't bother her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1056 0 0}Sorry... I just don't feel like talking to anyone right now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Anyway... I have homework, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}Hey... Sorry it's through the door, but can I ask you a question?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Is there something you believe in,[n]{f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Something that, even when everything is terrible, and you've been betrayed by everyone...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...It doesn't shake your conviction?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1094 0 0}You're very strong... I wish I was like you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}Yeah... It's a hard thing to find.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's probably not really a fair question, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1093 0 0}I apologized, but... I'm not sure it really got across.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like... there's this wall between us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Am I making any sense? ...Well, I'm gonna go study now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1056 0 0}Sorry... I want to be alone right now...[n]{f 1 1}
